---
id: evaluate-full
title: "Execute concept + condition + action pipeline"
description: "Runs the full ψ → φ → α pipeline for a given entity. Fully deterministic when timestamp is provided. No LLM involvement. Use dry_run: true to simulate without firing actions."
sidebar_label: "Execute concept + condition + action pipeline"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: docs/api-reference/generated/memintel-app-developer-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

  children={"Execute concept + condition + action pipeline"}
>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/evaluate/full"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Runs the full ψ → φ → α pipeline for a given entity. Fully deterministic when timestamp is provided. No LLM involvement. Use dry_run: true to simulate without firing actions.

  as={"h2"}
